raw_consumer_statement: My credit card with Barclays XXXX XXXX was stolen in XXXX and multiple transactions were made. I did not notice the card was stolen because I had no notifications of it being used like other credit card companies do. I noticed that I had a payment due on the card in XXXX on XX/XX/year>, which was strange because I hadnt used the card over 5 months. When I saw the statements I called them to let them know there was fraud on the card. They said they would open an investigation XX/XX/XXXX. Now in XX/XX/XXXX I am still disputing the charges. I have asked to send them documentation of my own transactions so it can show I was in my own city and they said they cant use that information. My credit score has now been affected, showing I have a high balance on my cards, Im getting charged high interest charges. Im making payments on the card that are over {$180.00} dollars and its not going towards the amount that I have used for my own personal transactions but to the fraud charges.
